output.sparql:
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT(MAX(?date) AS ?end) WHERE {
  wd:Q3435479 wdt:P361 ?season .
  ?season wdt:P1545 "1" .
  ?episode wdt:P361 ?season .
  ?episode wdt:P585 ?date .
}
